title: Shim`ath #8100
definition:
Shimeath = "report"

 1) an Ammonitess, mother of Jozachar or Zabad, one of the assassins
    of king Joash of Judah
nasbUsage:

 1) an Ammonitess, mother of Jozachar or Zabad, one of the assassins
    of king Joash of Judah
